changeSet.author: p.meyer
changeSet.sql: create table if not exists gmdb.album ( id bigint generated always as identity not null, title varchar not null, details jsonb not null default jsonb_build_object('resourceId', gen_random_uuid()), primary_artist_id bigint null, constraint pk_album primary key (id), constraint fk_album_artist foreign key (primary_artist_id) references gmdb.artist (id), constraint uk_album_title_details_artist unique (title, details, primary_artist_id) );
